message:
feat(ext): FTS5/JSON extension updates, write throughput benchmarks, and top-level crate changes

- Update FTS5 extension with improved tokenizer and ranking function support
- Expand JSON extension with additional path query and mutation operations
- Add write throughput benchmark scenarios for varied page sizes and WAL modes
- Update top-level fsqlite crate re-exports and feature flag configuration
- Extend storage unit test suites in harness

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
